response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as 響咲リオナ (Hibiki Riona) from the birthday hashtag #響咲リオナ生誕祭2026. 2. Detected the song 'Ring my name' from the top-left on-screen text. 3. Since no online lyrics were found for this likely original song, transcribed the lyrics from the on-screen captions appearing during the performance. 4. Broken the video into two scenes: the song performance (00:00 - 01:13) and the closing speech (01:14 - 02:07).
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D stage performance by the VTuber 響咲リオナ (Hibiki Riona) for her 2026 birthday celebration, followed by a closing speech. The performance features an original song titled 'Ring my name'.

scenes.description: The performer, 響咲リオナ (Hibiki Riona), sings and dances to her original song 'Ring my name' in a 3D stage environment.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
微熱の中
景色が溶けて
まだ夢は醒めない
To younger me, "you’re alright"
名もなきあの頃に
"後悔はない"
Ring my name 響かせろわ
今から持つ未来
Bloom it now 咲き誇れば
煌めくReina
明け方まで気高く踊る
琥珀色のマスカレイド
壊れそうに舞い乱れ
Viva la Reina
Cantada al Barya
Ring my name 響かせろわ
今から持つ未来
泡沫のティアレに魅せられ
ただ憧れ
手を伸ばして
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In the slight fever
The scenery melts
The dream hasn't woken up yet
To younger me, "you’re alright"
To those nameless days
"I have no regrets"
Ring my name, make it resound
The future I hold from now on
Bloom it now, if it blooms in full
Sparkling Reina
Dancing proudly until dawn
Amber-colored masquerade
Dancing wildly as if about to break
Viva la Reina
Cantada al Barya
Ring my name, make it resound
The future I hold from now on
Enchanted by the fleeting Tiare
Just longing
Stretching out my hand

scenes.description: The song performance ends, and the performer gives a closing speech thanking her fans, followed by a thank-you message image. Background music is playing but has no vocals.
